info.title: Brushfire API: Version 2025-07-22
info.description: The Brushfire REST API provides programmatic access to the Brushfire event ticketing and registration platform. It covers events, ticket types, sections and seats, attendees, orders, the shopping cart and checkout flow, groups, sessions and check-in, promotions and access codes, payment profiles, and webhooks (Hooks). Authenticate by sending your App Key (requested at https://developer.brushfire.com/key) in the Authorization header. The API is date-versioned: send the desired version in the api-version request header (for example, 2025-07-22). This document is the live specification published at api.brushfire.com/swagger.

servers.description: Brushfire API (date-versioned via the api-version header)

get.summary: List all access codes for a specific client (and additional parameters)

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: A string, a GUID, or an integer that corresponds to a specific client

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: An option string value from "Standard", "Template", or "Dynamic" that represents the kind of access code

parameters.name: isRedeemed
parameters.description: An optional boolean value if the access code has been redeemed

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: An option string to filter access codes by name

get.summary: Get details of a single access code

parameters.name: accessCodeId
parameters.description: A GUID that corresponds to a specific access code

post.summary: Creates the specified quantity of dynamic access codes based upon the provided template code

get.summary: Retrieve information for a specific account

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: An Email, a GUID, an Access Key, or an integer that corresponds to a specific account

post.summary: Authenticate a user via email and password or social service to get Access Key

get.summary: Retrieve an account that matches the provided email

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: An Email that corresponds to a specific account

get.summary: Retrieve all relevant attendee information for the given attendee number

parameters.name: attendeeId
parameters.description: An integer, GUID, or a string that corresponds to a specific attendee

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: An integer or a GUID that corresponds to a specific event (only necessary if sending an attendee code)

parameters.name: accessKey
parameters.description: The Access Key for the user context

parameters.name: qrSize
parameters.description: The width and height of the QR Code. If blank, no QR will be sent.

get.summary: Retrieve events and attendees for a specific cart

parameters.name: cartId
parameters.description: A valid CartId that was previously generated by /cart/id

parameters.name: accessKey
parameters.description: The Access Key for the user context

parameters.name: pos
parameters.description: A boolean indicating if this cart should be retrieved for POS mode

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of GUIDs representing the ID of each promotion you would like to exclude from the cart

parameters.name: originalOrderId
parameters.description: A valid OrderId to ease adding other attendees and add-ons

parameters.name: exchangeId
parameters.description: A valid ExchangeId to associate this cart with an exchange

get.summary: Returns specialized data from custom-written queries

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The GUID for the query you are running

parameters.name: eventNumber
parameters.description: If present, an integer representing the event number

parameters.name: granularity
parameters.description: If present, one of the following string values "hour", "minute", or "day"

parameters.name: startsAt
parameters.description: If present, the date/time in UTC to start data

parameters.name: endsAt
parameters.description: If present, the date/time in UTC to end data

parameters.name: inactive
parameters.description: Boolean pass in true to return inactive events.

parameters.name: qty
parameters.description: An integer to limit the number of results returned

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: An integer to skip the first events returned

parameters.name: archive
parameters.description: Boolean to return archived or not archvied events

get.summary: Returns the best available seats that match the supplied parameters for an assigned seat event. Does not reserve them.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: An integer or a GUID that corresponds to a specific event

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Integer to find a quantity of seats

parameters.name: sectionId
parameters.description: An optional string (the exact name) or a GUID representing the section

parameters.name: accessKey
parameters.description: The Access Key for the user context

parameters.name: typeId
parameters.description: Optional GUID to find seats in a particular type

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: An optional integer or a GUID that corresponds to a specific group

parameters.name: seatCode
parameters.description: An optional seat-level access code to unlock seats

parameters.name: nonconsecutive
parameters.description: Optional boolean to find seats that are non-consecutive

parameters.name: basePrice
parameters.description: Optional decimal to find seats in a particular base price

post.summary:
Move an event to a different client. The event must have no existing orders or emails.
The calling app must have access to both the source and target clients.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: An integer or a GUID that corresponds to the specific event you would like to move

requestBody.description: Request body for moving an event to a different client

Sends SMS messages to the provided phone number (only US and Canada)

UnitFee.description: Flat fee amount applied to this attendee. Ignored when API.Models.CartUpdateAttendeeInput.UnitFees is supplied.

UnitTax.description: Flat tax amount applied to each attendee. Ignored when API.Models.CartUpdateEventInput.UnitFees is supplied.

UnitFee.description: Flat fee amount applied to each attendee. Ignored when API.Models.CartUpdateEventInput.UnitFees is supplied.

UnitFees.description:
Itemized fee/tax line items to apply to every attendee in the cart for this event.
When supplied, this replaces the existing UnitFeesJson on each attendee and takes precedence over API.Models.CartUpdateEventInput.UnitFee and API.Models.CartUpdateEventInput.UnitTax.
If the existing attendees already have tax applied, the list must include at least one entry with FeeType=Tax.

DeliveryFee.description: Deprecated. Delivery is no longer included in order totals; this field is accepted for backwards compatibility but ignored.

Label.description: Display label shown to attendees (e.g. "Sales Tax", "Service Fee").

Percent.description: Percent of base price (0–100). Applies to both Fee and Tax rows.

CustomFeeOutput.description: A single custom fee or tax row from an attendee type's CustomFeesJson.

FlexTotal.description: Total number of redemptions. Only applicable for Flex Pass events.

FlexPer.description: Maximum number of redemptions per event. Only applicable for Flex Pass events.

FlexStartsAt.description:
When can redemptions start? Only applicable for Flex Pass events without Flex Relative Days.
If Flex Relative Days is set, this will be ignored.

FlexEndsAt.description:
When will redemptions end? Only applicable for Flex Pass events without Flex Relative Days.
If Flex Relative Days is set, this will be ignored.

ConnectedFlexEventUrlKeys.description: What events can this flex pass be redeemed for? Set "all" to allow all events.

FlexRelativeDays.description:
For how many days is the flex pass redeemable after purchase? Only applicable for Flex Pass events.
If Flex Relative Days is set, FlexStartsAt and FlexEndsAt will be ignored.

IsPrimaryEmail.description: This is used to mark the field as primary email field for the attendee.

RemoteUrl.description: Only set for fields of type RemoteFetch or RemoteValidate

RequireConfirm.description: Only set for fields of type Text, Name, Phone, Email, or Date

EmailDomains.description: The list of domains you would like to validate for or against for email fields.

LocationName.description: Leave null to use the original event's value

Dates.description: Leave null to use the original event's value

TimeZoneId.description: Leave null to use the original event's value

CategoryId.description: Leave null to use the original event's value

PaymentProfileId.description: Leave null to use the original event's value

CopySeatLayoutId.description: This is only if the source event is AST. This is either an event id, or layout id. Leave null to use the original event's value

CopyThemeEventId.description: Leave null to use the original event's value

AccessKey.description: Your account access key. This is used to authenticate your requests.

ClientId.description: The unique identifier for the client or organization that owns the event.

UrlKey.description: Url Keys help you group similar events and customize the event url

CategoryId.description: 3 - CAMP, 23 - CLASS, SEMINAR OR TRAINING, 14 - CONCERT, PERFORMANCE, PRODUCTION, 5 - CONFERENCE, 12 - OTHER

OverallCapacity.description: How many people do you expect to attend this event?

IsCapacityManaged.description: When this feature is enabled, a 15 minute timer ensures that all spots are held while they are in the cart. General admission events without this turned on will allow attendees to freely register and capacity will be managed at the point of placing an order instead of in the cart

IsHidden.description: Make this event private (only accessible via direct link)?

HasTickets.description: Enable Ticket links on confirmation emails?

AccountingCode.description: This value will appear on reports and will be sent to the payment gateway to help you reconcile.

ShowRemaining.description: If enabled, remaining tickets is shown to customers.

ShowSoldOut.description: If a given option is not in a selected group, sold out, expired, or future, do you still want the options to appear so your customers know all available options?

LockInGroups.description: If this is enabled, all attendees who join a group will do so at the same type and rate that the group was created under. This "locks in" the price for all group members regardless of when they sign up.

IsGroupCentric.description: Enable "Groups First" functionality? (only works if group minimums are not enforced)

IsGroupPrivate.description: Group names should remain private? (only works if IsGroupCentric is true)

AllowRefundDonation.description: Allow tickets to be donated back into available inventory prior to start of event

ConfirmationLogoImageUrl.description: The logo that appears on the confirmation page and emails. Must be a valid media library reference. Image should be 1200px x 400px for proper display.

GroupCentricText.description: Only available for group centric events.

AppImageUrl.description: If supplied this will be used alongside the app interface in all modes. Image should be 1090px (wide) x 1870px (high) for proper display. Must be a valid media library reference.

ContactPhone.description: The phone number for the event contact person.

OrganizerEmail.description: The email address for the event contact person.

ManagerEmails.description: Once daily, the address(es) provided here will receive an email with registration statistics and links to relevant reports for this event.

NotifyEmails.description: Each time an order is placed or a group notification email is sent, the address(es) provided here will be blind copied on the confirmation email. Separate multiple addresses with a comma.

IsInclusiveTaxes.description: When enabled, enter the total price including taxes. This price will be displayed as the inclusive price (including taxes and fees) and the tax amount will be calculated automatically for receipts and summaries. Once the event is created this may not be undone.

TaxRate.description: Deprecated. Tax is now configured per-attendee-type via customFees; this field is accepted for backwards compatibility but ignored.

OrderFeePercent.description:
These service fees are applied once per order, but are displayed in the inclusive fees on each attendee/add-on. They are assessed on the full price of each attendee/add-on inclusive of other fees, tax, discounts, or any other element of the cost, including this fee itself.
Deprecated. Order-level fees have been removed; configure fees per-attendee-type via customFees; this field is accepted for backwards compatibility but ignored.

SharedCapacities.description: These are your "Time Slots" if this is a time slot event.

CreditNumber.description: The default credit template to use when issuing credits for refunds or exchanges on this event. Leave null to use the organization-level default.

LogoUrl.description: The logo image URL that appears for this event. Must be a valid media library reference.

SiteBackgroundColor.description: Hex color code for the background

BlockedAccounts.description: Would you like to block certain accounts from seeing this event? If so, provide a list of account emails to block.

AllowedAccounts.description: Do you need to white list certain accounts to allow them to see this event? If so, provide a list of account emails to allow.

CustomCode.description:
Manage role only
This code will be executed in the body of every front-facing page related to this event.
Javascript must be enclosed in script tags and CSS must be enclosed in style tags.

CustomCodeHead.description:
Manage role only
This code will be placed once in the head of every front-facing page related to this event.
Javascript must be enclosed in script tags and CSS must be enclosed in style tags.

CustomTracking.description:
Manage role only
Values are per event: {0} = Order Total, {1} = Order Quantity, {2} = Order Number, {3} = Event Number, {4} = Event Title, {5} = Order Email, {6} = First Name, {7} = Last Name
This code will be exectuted ONLY on a successful order result.

ParentEventId.description: A parent is an event that is required in order to register for this event. If you give this event a parent, it will not appear in your store front. It will only be offered to people who purchase the parent.

PreRegEventId.description: When pre-registering via the app or the specialized web interface, attendees can load information from a past event to quickly register. Selecting an event below allows that link to happen without the end-user explicitly specifying the target event (this event). Even if nothing is selected below, auto-registration is available for any event.

WidgetBuyFlowUrl.description: If you are using our embeddable widget, we can redirect attendees to your page instead of Brushfire pages to keep their experience consistent.

WidgetPostAttendeeUrl.description: If you are using our embeddable widget, we can redirect attendees to your page instead of Brushfire pages to keep their experience consistent.

AttendeeFields.description: By default, all attendee fields will be connected to all attendee types.

TicketField1Header.description: This is the header label value for the custom ticket field.

TicketField1Label.description: Do you need more information on your tickets? You can use any standard field like "Attendee Number" or use one of your attendee/buyer/group field labels.

TicketField2Header.description: This is the header label value for the custom ticket field.

TicketField2Label.description: Do you need more information on your tickets? You can use any standard field like "Attendee Number" or use one of your attendee/buyer/group field labels.

TicketField3Header.description: This is the header label value for the custom ticket field.

TicketField3Label.description: Do you need more information on your tickets? You can use any standard field like "Attendee Number" or use one of your attendee/buyer/group field labels.

TicketImageUrl.description: Do you need a custom header image for your tickets? Image should be 1125px x 294px @216dpi for proper display. Must be a valid media library reference.

TicketBackgroundColor.description: Custom background color for your tickets. This should be a valid hex color code (e.g., #FFFFFF for white).

TicketAdImageUrl.description: Image should be 2250px x 1125px @ 300dpi (7.5in x 3.75in) for proper display. Must be a valid media library reference.

OfferSpot.description: Whether to offer Spot refund insurance for this event.

enabled.description: WHether Brushfire should attempt to find/create customersin Square for this event.

customerGroups.description: A list of Square Customer Group IDs - if provided, Square Customers for this event will be added to all of these groups.

overwriteProfile.description: If true, any personal data collected during checkout will overwrite existing customer data in Square. If false, personal data will be added, but existing Square data will not be overwritten.

Options.description: Only set for fields of type Checkbox, Dropdown, Radiobuttons, ItemList, or ItemAmount

RemoteUrl.description: Only set for fields of type RemoteFetch or RemoteValidate

RequireConfirm.description: Only set for fields of type Text, Name, Phone, Email, or Date

EmailDomains.description: The list of domains you would like to validate for or against for email fields.

DependentFields.description: Use this to create fields that are only visible when this option is selected

number.description: The Google Analytics tracking number for the event.

TargetClientId.description: The ID of the client to move the event to.

UrlKey.description: The URL key the event will have under the target client.

PaymentProfileId.description: The payment profile ID to assign to the event in the target client. Leave null to assign no payment profile.

UseNewClientFeeStructure.description:
Whether to replace the event's fee structure with the target client's fee structure. Defaults to true.
Setting this to false is restricted to Brushfire staff.

SharedCapacityName.description: For time slot events, if the SharedCapacityKind is "Time", you must provide a time here. i.e. "10:00 AM".

IsHidden.description: Only for time slot events. If true, attendee types connected to this shared capacity will not be visible.

ConnectedTypeNames.description: List of attendee type names or addons names that are connected to this shared capacity. Must not mix and match. Time Slot events allow for attendee types to be connected across multiple shared capacities.
